evidence_summary: Directional example: repeated interest in packable rain protection, fast weather shifts, and lightweight hiking layers.
transferability: Likely relevant for Swiss day hikes and commuter-to-trail use, especially around unpredictable alpine weather.
recommended_action: Validate demand with local search data, competitor assortment scan, and a small landing-page or campaign test.
risks: Example row only. Needs real source URLs, price checks, and local assortment coverage.

opportunity: Repair and resale service for premium outdoor gear
evidence_summary: Directional example: circularity, repairability, and second-hand outdoor gear appear as recurring customer and brand themes.
transferability: Potentially strong in Switzerland where premium gear prices and sustainability expectations are high.
recommended_action: Map competitor services, estimate operational requirements, and test with one category such as jackets or backpacks.
risks: Needs operational feasibility, margin, and partner validation.

opportunity: Trail-to-city technical fleece and commuter layer
evidence_summary: Directional example: outdoor aesthetics crossing into daily commuter wear and travel gear.
transferability: Could fit Swiss city-based weekend adventurers if price, fit, and office-friendly design are right.
recommended_action: Scan social and retailer signals, then compare against local assortment gaps and price points.
risks: May be fashion-led and short-lived; needs evidence separating durable demand from style noise.
